name: Sylvamo Corp
business: Sylvamo Corp is a global uncoated papers company producing uncoated freesheet (UFS) for paper products such as cutsize and offset paper, as well as market pulp. The company sells to end users, converters, agents, resellers, and paper distributors across Europe, Latin America, and North America.

exposures.sentence: We produce uncoated freesheet (UFS) for paper products such as cutsize and offset paper, as well as market pulp.
